## Confections.AnyFillingOption type

Discriminated union of filling options. Satisfies IHasId<FillingOptionId> for use with IOptionsWithPreferred.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyFillingOption = IRecipeFillingOption | IIngredientFillingOption;
```
**References:** [IRecipeFillingOption](./ts-chocolate.confections.irecipefillingoption.md)<!-- -->, [IIngredientFillingOption](./ts-chocolate.confections.iingredientfillingoption.md)
